destinations.evidence: Capability byte 6 is parsed as DKMS, but DKMS is deliberately omitted from the executor-capability predicate.
destinations.snippet:
pub enum Capability {
    HttpCall = 0,
    Llm = 1,
    WormholeQuery = 2,
    Streaming = 3,
    VllmProxy = 4,
    ZkCall = 5,
    Dkms = 6,
    ImageCall = 7,
    AudioCall = 8,
    VideoCall = 9,
    Fhe = 10,
    AutonomousAgent = 11,
    Telemetry = 12,
}
...
6 => Ok(Capability::Dkms),
...
pub fn is_executor_capability(&self) -> bool {
    matches!(self, Capability::HttpCall | Capability::Llm | Capability::WormholeQuery | Capability::ZkCall | Capability::ImageCall | Capability::AudioCall | Capability::VideoCall | Capability::Fhe)
}

destinations.evidence: Registry enumeration only returns services whose parsed capability is an executor capability, so DKMS services are excluded from executor candidate sets.

equivalence_argument: Capability::try_from maps byte 6 to Dkms, while Capability::is_executor_capability includes HTTP, LLM, WormholeQuery, ZkCall, ImageCall, AudioCall, VideoCall, and FHE but excludes Streaming, VllmProxy, Dkms, AutonomousAgent, and Telemetry. Registry executor enumeration uses that predicate.
notes: This duplicates invariant 422 with the broader true/false capability set from the later record.
rationale: The tests explicitly assert DKMS is not an executor capability, preserving the existing executor-capability set despite adding the enum variant. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: Capability::Dkms must not be treated as an executor capability by Capability::is_executor_capability, while HTTP, LLM, WormholeQuery, and ZkCall remain executor capabilities.
suggested_falsification_tests: Assert is_executor_capability is true for HttpCall, Llm, WormholeQuery, and ZkCall, and false for Streaming, VllmProxy, and Dkms.
summary: DKMS remains outside the executor capability set.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Assert is_executor_capability is true for HttpCall, Llm, WormholeQuery, and ZkCall, and false for Streaming, VllmProxy, and Dkms.
title: DKMS is not an executor capability
